completed_this_session.name: CardSearchSection duplicate auto-search on commander load (deps list bug)
CommanderPanel transient EDHREC browse during hydration

remaining_followups.name: E2E spec for commit 7405687 — click Change commander, assert exactly 1 t:legendary request
Cache-first commander hydration in loadForDeck — zero Scryfall calls on return visits; requires storing oracle_id alongside print id on deck row (card-cache keys on oracle_id)
Pre-existing Tailwind canonical-class lint warnings in CommanderPanel.tsx:22, :43

decisions.decision: Fold hasCommander into searchKey rather than gate the effect with two deps
decisions.rationale: Single source of truth for 'should we search'; absorbs the null→non-null transition through the same debouncer so one eventual fire instead of two

decisions.decision: Gate CommanderPanel on commander-store loading flag rather than block render inside CommanderSearch
decisions.rationale: Avoids transient mount of CommanderSearch during hydration; keeps CommanderSearch unaware of deck loading lifecycle

decisions.decision: Ref-keyed dedupe in CommanderSearch instead of disabling StrictMode
decisions.rationale: Preserves StrictMode's dev-mode bug-surfacing value; only no-ops identical re-invocations. Legitimate dep changes produce a new key and fire normally

decisions.decision: Silent abort in loadForDeck catch — do not set error state on AbortError
decisions.rationale: Prevents error banner from flashing between StrictMode's first invocation abort and second invocation completion

next_action: Run the session test suite (vitest + playwright) once to confirm no regressions landed. Then decide: FU-1 (E2E for commit 7405687, ~5min) or FU-2 (cache-first hydration, larger).
context_notes: Session was unplanned post-phase cleanup. Originally invoked /gsd-code-review-fix 02.3 to apply WR-1..WR-4, then user reported duplicate API calls which led to 4 follow-up fixes. Phase 02.3 remains CLOSED. All fixes are atomic commits on main. Context limit hit at 92%; FU-1 E2E test deferred as noted in 7405687 commit message.
